settings.title: Single Door Kit
settings.text: Start here for one hot roll-up door in a shop, garage, or workshop.

settings.title: Double / Multi-Door Kits
settings.text: Use the roll-up kit path and quantity options when covering more than one door.

settings.title: Residential Garage Door Kit
settings.text: For sectional panel garage doors instead of commercial roll-up doors.

settings.title: Choose Width / Measure
settings.text: Measure your door opening first so the kit width and quantity make sense.

settings.heading: Roll-Up Door Kit Paths
settings.intro: Use this page to choose the right BlueTex door kit path for hot roll-up doors, multiple doors, or residential garage doors.
settings.cta_heading: Need help choosing the right door kit?
